children.text: Sam came into the classroom and saw some friends there.
children.cn: 萨姆进了教室，在那儿看到了一些朋友。
children.notes: came into 进了；saw 是 see 的过去式

children.text: They had cups on their heads.
children.notes: had 是 have 的过去式
children.statement: The children had hats on their heads.

children.text: "Why do you have cups on your heads? Why are you laughing?" he asked.
children.cn: “你们为什么头上戴着杯子？你们为什么在笑？”他问道。
children.statement: Sam asked why they were crying.
children.explanation: 文中是 asking why they are laughing (问为什么在笑)。

children.cn: 大明告诉了他那个故事。
children.notes: told 是 tell 的过去式
children.explanation: 文中确实说大明告诉了萨姆故事。

children.text: They planned to play a baseball game.
children.cn: 他们计划打一场棒球赛。
children.notes: planned 计划；baseball game 棒球赛
children.explanation: 文中说的是 baseball game (棒球赛)。

children.text: Amy asked Lingling to bring some caps for the game.
children.cn: 埃米让玲玲带一些帽子来参加比赛。
children.notes: asked...to do 让……做……；caps 帽子
children.explanation: Amy 让 Lingling 带 caps。

children.cn: 但是玲玲带了一些杯子。
children.notes: brought 是 bring 的过去式
children.explanation: Lingling 带来的其实是 cups。
萨姆打开的是 bag (书包)。

children.statement: There were cups in Sam's bag.
children.explanation: 萨姆的包里有 baseball caps (棒球帽)。
